meaning: to receive mail; to receive a telegraph
sentence: 以前家里用收报机来接收天气预报信息。
pinyin: Yǐ qián jiā lǐ yòng shōu bào jī lái jiē shōu tiān qì yù bào xìn xī.
english: In the old days, people used a receiver at home to get weather forecast information by telegraph.

meaning: flying craft (airplane, drone, missile, balloon, spacecraft, satellite
sentence: 这款新型飞行器可以在城市上空自动飞行。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn xīn xíng fēi xíng qì kě yǐ zài chéng shì shàng kōng zì dòng fēi xíng.
english: This new type of flying craft can fly autonomously over the city.

meaning: by stages; staggered; step by step; in installments
sentence: 买这台冰箱可以分期付款，不用一次付清。
pinyin: Mǎi zhè tái bīng xiāng kě yǐ fēn qī fù kuǎn, bù yòng yī cì fù qīng.
english: You can pay for this refrigerator in installments rather than all at once.

meaning: blond fur; golden hair; (coll.) golden retriever
sentence: 他养了一只金毛，每天早上带它去公园跑步。
pinyin: Tā yǎng le yī zhī jīn máo, měi tiān zǎo shàng dài tā qù gōng yuán pǎo bù.
english: He has a golden retriever that he takes to the park for a run every morning.

sentence: 医生建议术后一个月内不宜有房事。
pinyin: Yī shēng jiàn yì shù hòu yī gè yuè nèi bù yí yǒu fáng shì.
english: The doctor advised avoiding sexual intercourse for one month after surgery.

meaning: not felt or perceived; to feel nothing about; indifferent; unimpressed
sentence: 这首歌我完全无感，不知道为什么这么火。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē wǒ wán quán wú gǎn, bù zhī dào wèi shén me zhè me huǒ.
english: I feel totally nothing about this song — I have no idea why it's so popular.

meaning: to be pleased to see (a circumstance, occurrence etc); to look favorab
sentence: 大家都乐见两岸关系能够进一步改善。
pinyin: Dà jiā dōu lè jiàn liǎng àn guān xì néng gòu jìn yī bù gǎi shàn.
english: Everyone is pleased to see cross-strait relations improve further.

sentence: 他从小就是球迷，最崇拜这位球星。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiùshì qiúmí, zuì chóngbài zhè wèi qiúxīng.
english: He has been a fan since childhood and admires this sports star the most.

sentence: 他十八岁就参军了，在部队待了五年。
pinyin: Tā shíbā suì jiù cān jūn le, zài bùduì dāi le wǔ nián.
english: He joined the army at eighteen and spent five years in the military.

sentence: 他换了一套新式的西装。
pinyin: Tā huàn le yī tào xīnshì de xīzhuāng.
english: He got a new-style suit.

meaning: 1. to become shaped; 2. to become formed
sentence: 蛋糕放入模具后，烤二十分钟就成型了。
pinyin: Dàngāo fàngrù múju hòu, kǎo èrshí fēnzhōng jiù chéngxíng le.
english: After putting the cake batter into the mold, bake it for twenty minutes and it will take shape.

sentence: 她是个很感性的人，容易被电影感动。
pinyin: Tā shì gè hěn gǎnxìng de rén, róngyì bèi diànyǐng gǎndòng.
english: She is a very emotional person who is easily moved by movies.

sentence: 她无私地帮助了每一位邻居。
pinyin: Tā wúsī de bāngzhù le měi yī wèi línjū.
english: She selflessly helped every one of her neighbors.

sentence: 街边的小贩卖着各种零食。
pinyin: Jiē biān de xiǎofàn mài zhe gèzhǒng língshí.
english: Street vendors sell all kinds of snacks by the roadside.

sentence: 扣除税款后，他实际到手的钱少了很多。
pinyin: Kòuchú shuìkuǎn hòu, tā shíjì dàoshǒu de qián shǎo le hěn duō.
english: After deducting taxes, the amount he actually takes home is much less.

meaning: 1. to detain; 2. to arrest; 3. to hold; 4. to confiscate
sentence: 警方将嫌疑人扣留以便进一步调查。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng jiāng xiányírén kòuliú yǐbiàn jìnyībù diàochá.
english: The police detained the suspect for further investigation.

meaning: 1. to donate; 2. to contribute; 3. donation; 4. contribution
sentence: 她决定捐献自己的眼角膜。
pinyin: Tā juédìng juānxiàn zìjǐ de yǎnjiǎomó.
english: She decided to donate her corneas.

sentence: 我岳父很喜欢喝茶聊天。
pinyin: Wǒ yuèfù hěn xǐhuān hē chá liáotiān.
english: My father-in-law loves drinking tea and chatting.

meaning: to make known to the public (for information or to seek comments); pub
sentence: 名单已在网上公示，请自行查看。
pinyin: Míng dān yǐ zài wǎng shàng gōng shì, qǐng zì xíng chá kàn.
english: The list has been made public online; please check it yourself.

meaning: migrant worker (who moved from a rural area of China to a city to find
sentence: 很多农民工在城市里打工赚钱。
pinyin: Hěn duō nóng mín gōng zài chéng shì lǐ dǎ gōng zuàn qián.
english: Many migrant workers earn money by working in cities.

meaning: sports car;1. racing bicycle; 2. sporting bicycle; 3. sports car; 4. l
sentence: 他梦想有一天能开上跑车。
pinyin: Tā mèngxiǎng yǒu yītiān néng kāi shàng pǎochē.
english: He dreams of driving a sports car one day.

sentence: 每年到这个时候都要缴税金。
pinyin: Měi nián dào zhège shíhou dōu yào jiǎo shuìjīn.
english: Every year at this time, taxes have to be paid.

meaning: 1. flight of steps; 2. (fig.) a means of advancement; 3. stepping ston
sentence: 图书馆门前有一段宽阔的阶梯。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn mén qián yǒu yī duàn kuānkuò de jiētī.
english: There is a wide flight of steps in front of the library.

sentence: 他在桌上留了一张纸条。
pinyin: Tā zài zhuō shàng liú le yī zhāng zhǐtiáo.
english: He left a slip of paper on the desk.

sentence: 医生说这种药物可能影响勃起功能。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō zhè zhǒng yàowù kěnéng yǐngxiǎng bóqǐ gōngnéng.
english: The doctor said this medication may affect erectile function.

sentence: 港口堆满了各种颜色的集装箱。
pinyin: Gǎngkǒu duī mǎn le gèzhǒng yánsè de jízhuāngxiāng.
english: The port was piled high with shipping containers of all colors.

sentence: 警察正在调查这起命案。
pinyin: Jǐngchá zhèngzài diàochá zhè qǐ mìng'àn.
english: The police are investigating this homicide case.

sentence: 他从军校毕业后当了军官。
pinyin: Tā cóng jūnxiào bìyè hòu dāng le jūnguān.
english: He became an officer after graduating from military academy.

sentence: 我们建了一个家庭群组方便联系。
pinyin: Wǒmen jiàn le yī gè jiātíng qúnzǔ fāngbiàn liánxì.
english: We created a family group to make it easier to stay in touch.

sentence: 这座热电厂为全市供暖供电。
pinyin: Zhè zuò rèdiàn chǎng wèi quán shì gōng nuǎn gōng diàn.
english: This combined heat and power plant supplies the whole city with heating and electricity.

sentence: 每个部门的用纸配额有限。
pinyin: Měi gè bùmén de yòng zhǐ pèi'é yǒuxiàn.
english: Each department has a limited paper quota.

meaning: 1. cover song; 2. to cover a song
sentence: 她翻唱了一首八十年代的老歌。
pinyin: Tā fānchàng le yī shǒu bāshí niándài de lǎo gē.
english: She covered a classic song from the eighties.

sentence: 盟军在战争中发挥了关键作用。
pinyin: Méngjūn zài zhànzhēng zhōng fāhuī le guānjiàn zuòyòng.
english: The allied forces played a key role in the war.

sentence: 公园里有一座漂亮的假山。
pinyin: Gōngyuán lǐ yǒu yī zuò piàoliang de jiǎshān.
english: There is a beautiful rockery in the park.

meaning: 1. negotiable instrument (draft, note etc); 2. voucher; 3. receipt
sentence: 请保留好所有的票据以便报销。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎoliú hǎo suǒyǒu de piàojù yǐbiàn bàoxiāo.
english: Please keep all receipts for reimbursement.

sentence: 他持股超过公司总股份的三成。
pinyin: Tā chí gǔ chāoguò gōngsī zǒng gǔfèn de sān chéng.
english: He holds more than thirty percent of the company's total shares.

sentence: 许多外商来这里投资建厂。
pinyin: Xǔduō wàishāng lái zhèlǐ tóuzī jiàn chǎng.
english: Many foreign businessmen come here to invest and build factories.

sentence: 该国调整了对华贸易政策。
pinyin: Gāi guó tiáozhěng le duì Huá màoyì zhèngcè.
english: The country has adjusted its trade policy toward China.

sentence: 他一不小心就陷入了情网。
pinyin: Tā yī bù xiǎoxīn jiù xiànrù le qíngwǎng.
english: Without thinking, he fell into the snare of love.

sentence: 中国古代发明了造纸术。
pinyin: Zhōngguó gǔdài fāmíng le zàozhǐ shù.
english: Ancient China invented the art of papermaking.

sentence: 这部小说描写了工人阶级的日常生活。
pinyin: Zhè bù xiǎoshuō miáoxiě le gōngrén jiējí de rìcháng shēnghuó.
english: This novel depicts the everyday life of the working class.

meaning: 1. to make more youthful; 2. to promote younger staff
sentence: 公司管理层正在逐步年轻化。
pinyin: Gōngsī guǎnlǐ céng zhèngzài zhúbù niánqīnghuà.
english: The company's management is gradually becoming younger.

sentence: 工人们正在架设新的电话线路。
pinyin: Gōngrén men zhèngzài jiàshè xīn de diànhuà xiànlù.
english: Workers are erecting new telephone lines.

sentence: 这些矿工每天都要下井工作。
pinyin: Zhèxiē kuànggōng měitiān dōu yào xià jǐng gōngzuò.
english: These miners have to go down into the mine shaft every day.

sentence: 这个港口城市以造船业闻名。
pinyin: Zhège gǎngkǒu chéngshì yǐ zàochuán yè wénmíng.
english: This port city is famous for its shipbuilding industry.

sentence: 他擅长短跑，百米成绩很好。
pinyin: Tā shàncháng duǎn pǎo, bǎi mǐ chéngjì hěn hǎo.
english: He is good at sprinting and has an excellent hundred-meter time.

sentence: 我们在海上看到了一头鲸鱼。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài hǎi shàng kàndào le yī tóu jīngyú.
english: We spotted a whale out at sea.

meaning: 1. primal chaos; 2. formless mass before creation in Chinese mythology
sentence: 停电后整个办公室陷入一片混沌。
pinyin: Tíngdiàn hòu zhěnggè bàngōngshì xiànrù yī piàn hùndùn.
english: After the power cut, the entire office descended into chaos.

sentence: 孩子们喜欢扮演巫师的游戏。
pinyin: Háizimen xǐhuān bànyǎn wūshī de yóuxì.
english: The children love playing games where they pretend to be wizards.

sentence: 咱俩去吃顿饭吧，好久没聚了。
pinyin: Zán liǎ qù chī dùn fàn ba, hǎo jiǔ méi jù le.
english: Let's the two of us go grab a meal — it's been ages since we hung out.
